title: Kachari Para Akadas Unnayan Shangstha
summary: Kachari Para Akadas Unnayan Shangstha (Bengali: কাচাঁরী পাড়া একাদশ উন্নয়ন সংস্থা) is a Bangladeshi women's professional football club from Jamalpur founded in 2006. It's a member of the Bangladesh Women's Football League.
text:
Kachari Para Akadas Unnayan Shangstha (Bengali: কাচাঁরী পাড়া একাদশ উন্নয়ন সংস্থা) is a Bangladeshi women's professional football club from Jamalpur founded in 2006. It's a member of the Bangladesh Women's Football League.

History
In December 2019, the club announced that they will take part in the 2019–20 Bangladesh Women's League, the top tier professional women's league of Bangladesh.
